title: citrus macrocalyx
intro: Citrus macrocalyx, also known as the wild orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and antifungal abilities. The health benefits of Citrus macrocalyx include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Citrus macrocalyx can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
